global_description: A medium-sized seabird with a streamlined body and long wings. Predominantly white with gray wings and back, featuring a slightly hooked yellow bill. The wings have a distinctive glaucous tint and the legs are pinkish.

part_details.wings: Long, narrow, gray with a glaucous tint, slightly darker tips.
part_details.body: Streamlined, predominantly white with a smooth texture.
part_details.bill: Short, slightly hooked, yellow with a sharp tip.
part_details.head: Rounded, white, with small dark eyes.

spatial_relations: The wings extend laterally from the sides of the body.
The bill protrudes forward from the front of the head.
The legs are positioned underneath the body, supporting it when on land.
